sections.paragraph:
adj.-

(1) lifted up, high, Isa 2:12. Job 40:11, 12 Job 40:12, רְאֵה כָל־גֵּאֶה וְהַשְׁפִּילֵהוּ “behold every thing that is high, and bring it low.”

(2) proud, arrogant, Jer 48:29. Pl. גֵּאִים the proud, often with the adjoined notion of impiety; as elsewhere, meekness and a humble spirit include the idea of piety (see עָנָו ). Psa 94:2 140:6 Pro 15:25 16:19 . LXX. ὑπερήφανοι, ὑβρισταί.
